extraction.one_line_summary: SOLER Marc attacked over 40km from finish on final climb, gained 38 seconds to win Paris-Nice by 4 seconds over YATES Simon
tactical_patterns: SOLER exploited 6th overall position 37 seconds down by attacking ultra-early, banking on leaders marking each other not chasing.
IZAGIRRE brothers plus WELLENS coalition specifically targeted YATES yellow jersey on final climb, revealing GC collaboration against race leader.
GORKA Gorka crashed dragging brother ION down, showing dual-brother team tactics create correlated risk in decisive moments.
DE LA CRUZ David won stage from break but SOLER took GC via time bonuses, revealing split objectives even within same breakaway.

rider_signals.SOLER Marc: positive: won GC from 6th at 37 seconds down via 40km solo effort, suggests exceptional TT strength on short climbing stages
rider_signals.YATES Simon: negative: lost yellow by 4 seconds despite having it, failed to respond when IZAGIRRE/WELLENS coalition attacked him specifically
rider_signals.DE LA CRUZ David: positive: second consecutive Paris-Nice final stage win suggests specialization in short technical mountain stages
rider_signals.WELLENS Tim: positive: led coalition to dislodge yellow jersey despite not contending GC himself, indicates super-domestique role
rider_signals.IZAGIRRE Gorka: negative: crashed on final climb taking brother down, weak descending or positioning under pressure
